{{Quote|Bogey 1212 here. 9662 is dead. I have the traitor in my sights. Executing Order 66.|Bogey 1212|<ref name="HE" />}}
'''Bogey 1212''' was a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] and member of [[Bogey Squad]] during the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

==Biography==
Under [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Faie/Legends|Faie]], 1212 and his squad hunted down [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] after he survived the initial [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] attack. After his [[Bogey 9662|partner]] was killed by a tree trap, the lone clone trooper was about to finish the injured [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] "traitor" but was quickly shot in the back by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chak (Wookiee)|Chak]].

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 83|''Republic'' 83]] {{1st}}
